domain: Maori whakapapa genealogical chant (Aotearoa NZ): ancestor-by-ancestor name sequence with per-name canonical phrase/title binding; line-by-line junior-to-senior call-response transmission; periodic kalokalo recitation reset checkpoint; tapu/mana honor binding enforces correct order.
specific_mechanism: WHAKAPAPA-K-GENERATION-CHAIN-PER-NAME-MNEMONIC-LINE-CASCADE-KALOKALO-RESET-TAPU-BINDING: LLM information-cascade with (1) G_chain K-generation ancestor name sequential chain; (2) P_phrase per-name canonical phrase-tag mnemonic anchor; (3) L_transfer line-by-line junior-to-senior call-response cascade; (4) E_reset kalokalo periodic-checkpoint reset phrase; (5) T_tapu tapu/mana honor binding integrity-check.
llm_application: WHAKAPAPA LLM mechanism + G_chain + P_phrase + L_transfer + E_reset + T_tapu. Differs from R505. R518. R530. R543. R555. R568. Differs from LM-Cascades + Routing + MoT + Multi-Obj + Edge-Cloud-Expert by G_chain + P_phrase + L_transfer + E_reset + T_tapu.
novelty_claim: Cascade literature covers cost/quality + sequential model routing. WHAKAPAPA adds genealogical-K-generation + per-name mnemonic + junior-senior + reset + tapu. K=5.
